root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd') first_result, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.omc_name g1, meta_objects.zh_name g2, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums g3, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.total_alarm_nums g4, case when tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums=0 then '0' else cast(round(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.total_alarm_nums/tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums,2) as varchar2(8)) end g5, case when tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums =0 then '0' else cast(round(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.total_alarm_duration/tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums,2) as varchar2(8)) end g6, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level1 g7, case when tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level1=0 then '0' else cast(round(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_duration_level1/tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level1,2) as varchar2(8))end g8, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level2 g9, case when tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level2 =0 then '0' else cast(round(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_duration_level2/tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level2,2) as varchar2(8))end g10 from tfa_alarm_vim_sum tfa_alarm_vim_sum ,meta_objects meta_objects where tfa_alarm_vim_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_vim_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_vim_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tfa_alarm_vim_sum.object_class = meta_objects.object_class(+) order by tfa_alarm_vim_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_vim_sum.omc_name,meta_objects.zh_name asc )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd') first_result, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.omc_name g1, meta_objects.zh_name g2, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums g3, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.total_alarm_nums g4, case when tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums=0 then '0' else cast(round(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.total_alarm_nums/tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums,2) as varchar2(8)) end g5, case when tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums =0 then '0' else cast(round(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.total_alarm_duration/tfa_alarm_vim_sum.ne_nums,2) as varchar2(8)) end g6, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level1 g7, case when tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level1=0 then '0' else cast(round(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_duration_level1/tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level1,2) as varchar2(8))end g8, tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level2 g9, case when tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level2 =0 then '0' else cast(round(tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_duration_level2/tfa_alarm_vim_sum.alarm_nums_level2,2) as varchar2(8))end g10 from tfa_alarm_vim_sum tfa_alarm_vim_sum ,meta_objects meta_objects where tfa_alarm_vim_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_vim_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_vim_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tfa_alarm_vim_sum.object_class = meta_objects.object_class(+) order by tfa_alarm_vim_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_vim_sum.omc_name,meta_objects.zh_name asc )

ColumnItem.DisplayName: 一级告警平均历时(分钟)
二级告警平均历时(分钟)
